entities.name: MAKUENI COUNTY, KENYA
entities.description: A region in Kenya experiencing intensifying migration flows.

entities.name: MALE OUTMIGRATION
entities.description: The movement of men out of rural areas, creating a void in the household.

entities.name: ASPIRATIONS
entities.description: The aspired futures and goals of rural men and women.

entities.name: NARRATIVE-BASED SURVEY TOOL
entities.description: A novel tool used to investigate aspired futures.

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative research method used to gather insights from groups.

entities.name: SEMISTRUCTURED INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A qualitative research method used to gather detailed individual insights.

entities.name: FARM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of managing agricultural activities, increasingly undertaken by women due to male outmigration.

entities.name: COMMERCIALISING FARM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: The goal of turning farm activities into commercial ventures.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL OPPORTUNITY SPACE
entities.description: The range of possibilities and resources available for agricultural activities.

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD LEVEL
entities.description: The unit of analysis for aspirations, which may overlook individual differences.

entities.name: INTRAHOUSEHOLD HETEROGENEITY
entities.description: The differences in contributions, agency, and aspirations among members of the same household.

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD STRATEGY
entities.description: The overall plan developed at the household level through negotiated individual strategies and aspirations.

relationships.description: Related to role as farm managers
